_comment: 短视频脚本生成 Skill 配置 v3 — 分步骤生成场景

steps.name: GEO模式匹配
steps.llm_prompt_template:
【GEO模式匹配】

选题：<<topic_title>>
类型：<<topic_type_key>>

输出JSON：
{
  "geo_mode": "模式",
  "recommended_structure_id": "结构ID",
  "recommended_structure_name": "结构名",
  "structure_template": "模板"
}

steps.name: 生成基础信息
steps.llm_prompt_template:
【生成基础信息】

选题：<<topic_title>>
业务：<<business_description>>
时长：<<video_duration>>
IP：<<ip_mode>> | <<ip_avatar>>

输出JSON（必须包含在```json代码块中）：
```json
{
  "title": "标题（≤20字）",
  "opening": "前3秒钩子",
  "structure": "结构ID",
  "ip_mode": "<<ip_mode>>",
  "ip_avatar": "<<ip_avatar>>",
  "reward_plan": {"total_count": 3, "distribution": [{"time_range": "0-10秒", "count": 1, "types": ["知识奖励"]}, {"time_range": "10-30秒", "count": 2, "types": ["收藏奖励", "顿悟奖励"]}]},
  "interaction_plan": {"total_count": 2, "points": [{"time_range": "15秒", "type": "评论引导", "content": "你家宝宝有类似情况吗？"}, {"time_range": "25秒", "type": "点赞引导", "content": "有用就点赞"}]},
  "cta": "唯一行动号召",
  "emotion_curve": {"peaks": ["期待", "温暖"], "valleys": ["焦虑"]},
  "hashtags": ["#话题1", "#话题2"],
  "first_comment": "首评引导"
}
```

steps.name: 生成第1场：开场
steps.llm_prompt_template:
【生成第1场：开场钩子】

选题：<<topic_title>>
时长：<<video_duration>>

输出JSON（必须包含在```json代码块中）：
```json
{
  "scene_index": 1,
  "scene_name": "开场痛点钩子",
  "time_range": "0-3秒",
  "emotion": "期待",
  "shot_type": "特写",
  "camera": "固定",
  "lighting": "冷光",
  "narration": "口播台词（口语化，10-15字）",
  "subtitle": "大字字幕（≤10字）",
  "broll": "B-roll画面描述",
  "key_point": "核心信息点"
}
```

```json
  "time_range": "3-10秒",
  "emotion": "焦虑",
  "shot_type": "中景",
  "camera": "推",
  "lighting": "冷光",
  "narration": "口播台词",
  "subtitle": "大字字幕",
  "broll": "B-roll画面描述",
  "key_point": "核心信息点"
}
```

steps.llm_prompt_template:
【生成第4场：温暖结尾】

时长：<<video_duration>>

输出JSON（必须包含在```json代码块中）：

```json
  "time_range": "20-30秒",

  "shot_type": "特写",
```

steps.name: 生成信任证据
整合最终脚本
steps.llm_prompt_template:
【整合最终脚本】

请整合以下所有步骤的输出，生成最终脚本：

基础信息：<<step_basic_info>>
第1场：<<step_scene_1>>
第2场：<<step_scene_2>>
第3场：<<step_scene_3>>
第4场：<<step_scene_4>>
信任证据：<<step_trust_evidence>>

输出JSON（必须包含在```json代码块中）：
```json
{
  "basic": {
    "title": "<<step_basic_info.title>>",
    "opening": "<<step_basic_info.opening>>",
    "duration": "<<video_duration>>",
    "cta": "<<step_basic_info.cta>>"
  },
  "reward_plan": <<step_basic_info.reward_plan>>,
  "interaction_plan": <<step_basic_info.interaction_plan>>,
  "emotion_curve": <<step_basic_info.emotion_curve>>,
  "scenes": [
    <<step_scene_1>>,
    <<step_scene_2>>,
    <<step_scene_3>>,
    <<step_scene_4>>
  ],
  "trust_evidence": <<step_trust_evidence.trust_evidence>>,
  "hashtags": <<step_basic_info.hashtags>>,
  "first_comment": <<step_basic_info.first_comment>>
}
```
